/usr/bin/c++   -std=c++11 -Wall -O3 -g -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/uav_utils-test.dir/src/uav_utils_test.cpp.o  -o /home/kkcqh/WTF/ackermann_ego_planner/devel/lib/uav_utils/uav_utils-test   -L/home/kkcqh/WTF/ackermann_ego_planner/src/ego-planner/src/uav_simulator/Utils/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8  -L/home/kkcqh/WTF/ackermann_ego_planner/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kkcqh/WTF/ackermann_ego_planner/src/ego-planner/src/uav_simulator/Utils/cmake_utils/lib/mosek8:/home/kkcqh/WTF/ackermann_ego_planner/build/gtest:/home/kkcqh/WTF/ackermann_ego_planner/build/gtest/lib ../../../../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -luav_utils -lpthread
